title: Sweet Pepper Delight Bowl
description: A vegan recipe that combines the natural sweetness of peppers and a hint of delight.
instructions: Cut the red pepper into strips and place on a baking sheet.
Roast the pepper in the oven for 20-25 minutes, or until tender.
In a small bowl, mix together the sweet delight chutney and chopped cilantro.
To assemble the bowl, place the cooked brown rice on the bottom, followed by the roasted red pepper strips and avocado slices.
Drizzle the sweet delight chutney mixture on top of the peppers.
